question: Was the journalist from the Washington Post, another newspaper, a magazine, or are you not sure?
answer:
The journalist, I believe, was from the Washington Post. I have to mention here that when the American camp transferred him from Khana, they took him to the American University in Beirut, Lebanon.

He later sent me a note saying:
"The care and the attention I got in your little hospital was 10 to 20 times better than here. Plus, here I pay a lot of money, but I don't even get that attention. God bless you, and God bless all the Kurds."
